sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34105" key="e)metopoii/+a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐμετο-ποιΐα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n34105.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">causing to vomit</tr_>, Dionys.Aeg. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4040.tlg001:p.130B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Bibl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.130B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
